title: Upon Reape.
content:
Reape's eyes so raw are that, it seems, the flies
    Mistake the flesh, and fly-blow both his eyes;
    So that an angler, for a day's expense,
    May bait his hook with maggots taken thence.
meaning:
"Upon Reape." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
